questions.question: Explain K-map grouping and its advantage over algebraic simplification.
questions.modelAnswer: K-maps group adjacent 1s in powers of 2 to eliminate variables. Advantages: Visual, systematic, reduces errors.

questions.question: Simplify F(A,B,C) = Σ(0,2,3,5,7) using K-map.
questions.modelAnswer: Group minterms 3,2,7,5 → C; minterm 0 → A'B'. Result: F = C + A'B'.

questions.question: Differentiate combinational and sequential circuits.
questions.modelAnswer: Combinational: Output depends only on current inputs. Sequential: Output depends on inputs and past states (uses memory).
